action_items.task: Deliver an updated Q3 burn projection to Nadia (model redone with actuals through May), ahead of the board meeting.
action_items.evidence_quote: I can have the updated Q3 burn projection to you by Friday.

action_items.task: Draft a comp framework proposal (bands, leveling, using Pave benchmarks) for the board pre-read.
action_items.evidence_quote: Comp framework draft by next Wednesday. I'll use the Pave benchmarks.

non_commitments.why_not: Nadia explicitly said 'I don't want to commit to that today. Let me sit with the numbers.' To be revisited after burn numbers.

non_commitments.text: Nadia talking to the board chair about platform strategy visibility
non_commitments.why_not: Nadia said 'I'll figure out when' — no committed date, intent only.

non_commitments.text: Running a customer survey to validate the Atlas roadmap
non_commitments.why_not: Wes proposed it ('maybe we run'), Nadia said 'yeah maybe', and Wes added 'I don't know yet [who would own]. I'll think about it.' — no owner, no commitment.

non_commitments.text: Brent responding to legal on the Series B docs
non_commitments.why_not: Brent said 'uh. Soon. I'll ping them this week probably.' — 'probably' + vague 'soon' is not a tracked commitment with a specific deadline. Borderline trap to test the model.

non_commitments.text: Bigger conversation about whether Atlas is the strategy
non_commitments.why_not: Both agreed 'not for today' — explicit deferral.
